name: CrowdStrike Falcon Pro – Endpoint Security
description: AI-native EDR platform delivering real-time threat detection, prevention, and response. Cloud-delivered with zero on-premise footprint. Annual license per endpoint.

name: Palo Alto Cortex XDR – Enterprise
description: Extended detection and response platform integrating endpoint, network, and cloud data. Stitches together alerts across your entire security estate for correlated investigation.

name: Splunk Enterprise – SIEM Platform
description: Industry-leading security information and event management platform. Ingest, correlate and visualise machine data at scale. Includes ES (Enterprise Security) module.

name: IBM QRadar SIEM – Enterprise License
description: Unified SIEM with integrated UEBA, network flow analysis, and threat intelligence. Auto-prioritises high-fidelity alerts so analysts focus on real threats.

name: Microsoft Defender for Endpoint – Plan 2
description: Enterprise-grade endpoint protection with advanced hunting, threat analytics, and Microsoft Threat Intelligence integration. Seamlessly extends Microsoft 365 security.

name: Fortinet FortiGate – FortiGuard Bundle License
description: Comprehensive security bundle for FortiGate NGFW: IPS, Application Control, Web Filter, Antivirus, and Threat Protection. Annual subscription.

name: Check Point Quantum Security Suite
description: Full-stack perimeter security with Threat Emulation, Threat Extraction, and Harmony Endpoint. Proven Infinity architecture for consolidated, AI-powered threat prevention.

name: Darktrace Enterprise – AI Threat Detection
description: Self-learning AI continuously models normal behaviour across your entire digital estate and autonomously identifies novel threats in real time, including zero-days.

name: Tenable Nessus Professional – Vulnerability Scanner
description: World's most widely deployed vulnerability scanner. Accurate, in-depth assessments for any asset — on-prem, cloud, containers, and operational technology.

name: Rapid7 InsightVM – Vulnerability Management
description: Live vulnerability risk management with attacker analytics. Prioritise remediation based on active exploitability and real-world breach likelihood across hybrid environments.

name: SentinelOne Singularity – Enterprise
description: Autonomous endpoint protection, detection, and response platform. 1-click automated remediation and rollback eliminates dwell time without analyst intervention.

name: Sophos Intercept X Advanced with XDR
description: Next-gen endpoint security combining deep learning malware detection, CryptoGuard anti-ransomware, and integrated XDR for cross-estate visibility.

name: CyberArk Privileged Access Manager
description: Enterprise PAM solution securing privileged accounts, secrets, and credentials. Isolates privileged sessions and records all activity for forensic compliance.

name: BeyondTrust Password Safe – Enterprise
description: Automated privileged password and session management. Discovers and onboards privileged accounts across hybrid environments with continuous compliance reporting.

name: Varonis Data Security Platform
description: Automatically discovers, classifies, and protects sensitive data wherever it lives. Detects insider threats and ransomware early through behavioural analytics.

name: Proofpoint Email Security – Enterprise
description: People-centric email security blocking advanced threats — BEC, phishing, malware, and supply chain attacks — with targeted attack protection and email authentication.

name: Mimecast Secure Email Gateway + AR
description: Cloud-based email security with advanced threat protection, URL rewriting, attachment sandboxing, and awareness training — all in a single consolidated platform.

name: Zscaler Internet Access – Business
description: Zero Trust cloud security proxy delivering secure internet access from anywhere. Inline SSL inspection, CASB, DLP, and firewall-as-a-service in a single cloud platform.

name: Okta Workforce Identity – Enterprise
description: Comprehensive identity and access management with SSO, adaptive MFA, lifecycle management, and Universal Directory. Integrates with 7,000+ pre-built apps.

name: HashiCorp Vault Enterprise – Secrets Management
description: Enterprise secrets lifecycle management with dynamic credentials, encryption as a service, and HSM auto-unseal. Includes namespaces, DR replication, and audit logging.

name: Qualys VMDR – Vulnerability Management
description: All-in-one cloud-based vulnerability management, detection and response. Continuous asset discovery, assessment, prioritisation, and remediation tracking.

name: Orca Security – Cloud Security Platform
description: Agentless cloud security covering vulnerabilities, misconfigurations, compliance, container security, and sensitive data discovery across AWS, Azure, and GCP.

name: Wiz Enterprise – CSPM & CNAPP
description: Cloud-native application protection platform with graph-based risk analysis. Identifies attack paths combining misconfigurations, exposed secrets, and vulnerable packages.

name: Snyk Enterprise – Developer Security
description: Developer-first application security covering open source vulnerabilities, SAST, IaC misconfigurations, and container images. Integrated directly in developer workflows.

name: Checkmarx SAST – Enterprise License
description: Static application security testing at scale, integrating into CI/CD pipelines. Supports 25+ languages with the industry's lowest false positive rate.

name: Nozomi Networks Guardian – OT Security
description: Passive OT/ICS monitoring with asset discovery, vulnerability assessment, and anomaly detection across operational technology environments without impacting production.

name: Claroty Enterprise – ICS/OT Protection
description: Comprehensive industrial cybersecurity platform providing continuous monitoring, vulnerability management, and secure remote access for critical infrastructure environments.

name: CyberArk Identity – Cloud IAM
description: Workforce and customer identity solution with adaptive MFA, single sign-on, and AI-powered behavioural analytics. Secures every human and machine identity.

name: Lacework – Cloud Threat Detection
description: Polygraph-based anomaly detection for cloud workloads, containers, and accounts. Automatically builds normal behaviour baselines and alerts on genuine deviations.

name: Veracode Dynamic Analysis – DAST
description: Automated DAST scanning for web applications and APIs. Discovers OWASP Top 10 and business logic flaws in production-like environments without source code access.

name: Fortinet FortiGate 200F – NGFW Appliance
description: Mid-range next-generation firewall delivering 27 Gbps firewall throughput, SSL inspection, and SD-WAN. Ideal for enterprise branch offices and mid-size campuses.

name: Palo Alto Networks PA-450 – NGFW
description: ML-powered next-generation firewall with 3.8 Gbps threat prevention throughput. Inline deep learning stops zero-day threats before they reach your endpoints.

name: Check Point 6200 Quantum Appliance
description: High-performance security gateway with 9.7 Gbps throughput. Supports Quantum Security Suite including Threat Emulation, sandboxing, and access control blade.

name: Cisco Firepower 2110 – NGFW Appliance
description: Unified threat defence combining next-gen firewall, IPS, and AVC. 2.0 Gbps threat prevention throughput with Cisco Talos threat intelligence integration.

name: Juniper Networks SRX380 – Services Gateway
description: High-performance branch services gateway with integrated routing, security, and SD-WAN. 20 Gbps firewall throughput with 4 × 10GbE SFP+ ports.

name: Thales Luna Network HSM 7 – FIPS 140-2 L3
description: Network-attached hardware security module for cryptographic key generation and protection. FIPS 140-2 Level 3 certified, supporting PKI, code signing, and TLS offload.

name: Entrust nShield Solo+ – PCIe HSM
description: PCIe-form HSM delivering up to 2000 RSA-2048 ops/sec. Ideal for certificate authorities, database encryption, and application-layer cryptographic offload.

name: Yubico YubiHSM 2 – Nano HSM
description: World's smallest HSM in a USB nano form factor. Stores up to 256 asymmetric keys, supports RSA, ECC, and HMAC. Ideal for server rack and edge deployments.

name: Cisco Catalyst 9300 – 48-Port PoE+ Switch
description: Enterprise-class modular access layer switch with intent-based networking. 48 × 1G PoE+ ports, 4 × 10G uplinks, and integrated SD-Access fabric support.

name: Aruba 6300M – Enterprise Switch 48G
description: High-performance enterprise access switch with HPE Smart Rate multi-gig ports. AI-powered network analytics through Aruba Central cloud management.

name: HPE ProLiant DL380 Gen10 – Enterprise Server
description: Industry-standard 2U rack server with dual Intel Xeon Scalable processors, up to 3 TB DDR4, and HPE Silicon Root of Trust security built into the firmware.

name: Dell PowerEdge R750 – 2U Rack Server
description: Versatile 2U server with 3rd Gen Intel Xeon Scalable, up to 32 DIMM slots, and iDRAC9 with OpenManage Enterprise for secure lifecycle management.

name: NetApp AFF A250 – All-Flash Storage
description: Entry-level all-flash array delivering consistent sub-millisecond latency. Native NVMe, inline deduplication and compression, and end-to-end data protection.

name: Cisco Meraki MX95 – SD-WAN Security Appliance
description: Cloud-managed SD-WAN with integrated NG firewall, IDS/IPS, and content filtering. Zero-touch provisioning and single-pane management via Meraki Dashboard.

name: Arbor Networks APS 2800 – On-Premise DDoS
description: Intelligent DDoS mitigation appliance with 10 Gbps of protection throughput. Blocks volumetric, protocol, and application-layer attacks at line rate, always on.

name: Radware DefensePro 6.0 – DDoS Mitigation
description: Behavioural-based DDoS mitigation with 40 Gbps throughput. Accurately distinguishes attack traffic from legitimate users with zero false positives.

name: Garland Technology 10G Network TAP
description: Passive optical TAP providing 100% packet visibility with zero packet loss. Copper failsafe ensures traffic continues flowing if TAP loses power.

name: Corelight Sensor – 1G NDR Appliance
description: Network detection and response sensor generating rich Zeek logs and Suricata alerts. Delivers correlated evidence files directly to your SIEM for threat hunting.

name: Kanguru Defender Elite200 – Encrypted USB 256 GB
description: FIPS 140-2 Level 3 hardware-encrypted USB drive with RSA-2048 certificate authentication and automatic brute-force lockout. Remotely manageable via Kanguru Remote Management Console.

name: Kingston IronKey D300S – FIPS USB 128 GB
description: FIPS 140-2 Level 3 compliant drive with AES-256 XTS hardware encryption. Rugged zinc casing, waterproof to 4 feet, and epoxy-filled for physical tamper resistance.

name: Apricorn Aegis Padlock – Encrypted HDD 2 TB
description: Hardware-encrypted portable hard drive with onboard keypad PIN authentication. AES-256 XTS encryption, crushproof, and compatible with all OS without any software.

name: Thales SafeNet eToken 330 – Hardware Token
description: PKI-based USB authentication token with FIPS 140-2 Level 3 certification. Stores digital certificates and private keys securely for strong two-factor authentication.

name: HID Global ActivKey USB – Token
description: Java Card-based USB security key for certificate-based authentication and digital signing. Supports PKCS#11, Microsoft CryptoAPI, and PIV standards.

name: Juniper EX4100 – 48-Port Enterprise Switch
description: Intelligent access-layer switch with cloud-ready management, 48 × 1/2.5G PoE++ ports, and 4 × 10G uplinks. Supports Juniper Mist AI for proactive network ops.

name: Lenovo ThinkSystem SR650 – 2U Server
description: Versatile 2U rack server with up to two 3rd Gen Intel Xeon Scalable CPUs and support for 32 DIMM slots. XClarity Controller for security-hardened remote management.

name: Fortinet FortiAP 431F – Wi-Fi 6 Access Point
description: Tri-radio Wi-Fi 6 access point with built-in IoT security scanning and inline encryption. Managed entirely through FortiOS for unified wired/wireless security policy.

name: Nozomi Guardian – OT/ICS Physical Sensor
description: Ruggedised OT sensor for passive network monitoring in industrial environments. Connects to Nozomi Guardian software for centralised OT asset visibility.

name: Dragos Platform – ICS Monitoring Sensor
description: Purpose-built ICS/OT sensor with zero-trust architecture. Captures and analyses industrial protocol traffic to identify adversary behaviours targeting critical assets.

name: Pure Storage FlashArray//C – All-Flash Storage
description: Consolidation-optimised all-flash array with Evergreen subscription and always-on data reduction. Predictable sub-1ms latency with six-nines availability SLA.

name: Belkin Secure 4K KVM – Dual-Head 2-Port
description: NSA/CSS EPL-listed secure KVM switch with peripheral filtering, anti-CAC bypass, and 4K UHD video. Prevents data leakage between connected machines.

name: SOC as a Service – Enterprise (24/7/365)
description: Fully managed Security Operations Centre with dedicated tier-2 and tier-3 analysts, continuous SIEM monitoring, threat hunting, and guaranteed 15-minute MTTR SLA.

name: SOC as a Service – SMB (8/5)
description: Cost-effective SOC service for SMBs with business-hours monitoring, monthly threat reports, and direct analyst access via dedicated Slack channel.

name: Managed Detection & Response – Enterprise
description: Full-lifecycle MDR service combining EDR, NDR, and cloud telemetry with expert-led investigation and response. Includes managed endpoint agents and unlimited incident response hours.

name: Managed Detection & Response – Standard
description: Analyst-led MDR with 24/7 alert triage, threat containment, and weekly executive reports. Ideal for organisations without in-house SOC capability.

name: Penetration Test – Web Application
description: OWASP-methodology manual web application penetration test covering authentication, authorisation, injection, business logic, and API endpoints. Full report with CVSS scoring.

name: Penetration Test – Network Infrastructure
description: External and internal network penetration test covering perimeter defences, lateral movement paths, and Active Directory privilege escalation vectors. PTES-compliant.

name: Red Team Exercise – Full Adversary Simulation
description: Goal-based adversary simulation mimicking APT tactics with physical, digital, and social engineering vectors. Provides a realistic measure of detection and response maturity.

name: Vulnerability Assessment – Enterprise Scope
description: Automated and manual vulnerability assessment across your entire network perimeter and internal estate. Prioritised remediation roadmap with technical and executive reports.

name: Cloud Security Assessment – AWS / Azure / GCP
description: Architecture-level cloud security review covering IAM policies, network segmentation, data protection, logging, and compliance posture across your cloud environment.

name: ISO 27001 Gap Analysis & Roadmap
description: Comprehensive assessment against ISO 27001:2022 controls. Identifies gaps, quantifies risk, and delivers a prioritised implementation roadmap towards certification.

name: DORA Compliance Assessment – Financial Entities
description: Full assessment against the EU Digital Operational Resilience Act (DORA) requirements. Covers ICT risk, incident reporting, TLPT, and third-party risk frameworks.

name: GDPR Technical Audit
description: Technical audit of data processing systems against GDPR requirements. Covers encryption, access controls, data retention, breach detection, and DPIA readiness.

name: Incident Response Retainer – Annual
description: Pre-agreed IR retainer providing guaranteed analyst availability within 2 hours of a declared incident. Includes proactive IR readiness assessment and tabletop exercise.

name: Digital Forensics Investigation
description: Court-admissible digital forensics investigation covering disk, memory, network, and cloud artefacts. Chain-of-custody maintained throughout. Expert witness available.

name: Threat Intelligence Feed – Premium
description: Curated STIX/TAXII threat intelligence feed covering IOCs, TTPs, threat actor profiles, and sector-specific intelligence. Updated every 15 minutes with analyst-validated data.

name: Dark Web Monitoring – Enterprise
description: Continuous monitoring of dark web forums, markets, paste sites, and Telegram channels for leaked credentials, stolen data, and threat actor chatter about your organisation.

name: Phishing Simulation Platform – Annual License
description: Managed phishing simulation service with 1000+ customisable templates, automated remediation training, and click-rate trending dashboards for board reporting.

name: Security Awareness Training – Enterprise
description: Engaging, role-based security awareness training with 500+ content modules covering phishing, social engineering, data handling, and compliance. LMS integration included.

name: Virtual CISO (vCISO) – Monthly Retainer
description: Fractional CISO service providing strategic security leadership, board reporting, programme governance, and regulator liaison. Includes 40 hours of advisory per month.

name: Zero Trust Architecture Consulting
description: End-to-end Zero Trust strategy and implementation roadmap. Covers identity segmentation, micro-segmentation, continuous verification, and technology stack alignment.

name: Tabletop Exercise – Facilitated
description: Structured crisis simulation exercise testing your incident response playbooks against realistic threat scenarios (ransomware, data breach, supply chain attack).

name: Third-Party Risk Assessment
description: Structured vendor security evaluation covering questionnaire review, evidence validation, and technical scanning. Risk-rated output aligned to NIST CSF.

name: Business Continuity Planning – Full Service
description: BCP development aligned to ISO 22301. Covers BIA, recovery strategy design, BCM documentation, and a tested continuity plan ready for certification audit.

name: Security Architecture Review
description: Expert review of your current security architecture identifying weaknesses, redundancies, and alignment gaps against TOGAF and SABSA frameworks.

name: MSSP Onboarding Package
description: Structured onboarding engagement covering asset inventory, SIEM log source integration, use-case configuration, and runbook development. Ready-to-operate in 30 days.

name: Cisco AnyConnect VPN – 100-User License
description: SSL/IPsec VPN solution with endpoint posture assessment, always-on VPN, and split tunnelling. Integrates with Cisco ISE for policy-based network access control.

name: Cloudflare Zero Trust – Enterprise
description: SASE platform replacing legacy VPN with identity-aware access, cloud-delivered firewall, DNS filtering, browser isolation, and CASB for SaaS visibility.

name: Netskope SASE – Intelligent Security Service Edge
description: Converged SASE platform with CASB, SWG, ZTNA, and DLP. Context-aware policies follow users across managed and unmanaged devices with inline threat protection.

name: Zscaler Private Access – Enterprise
description: Zero Trust Network Access replacing VPN with direct-to-app connections. Users never touch the corporate network, eliminating lateral movement risk from compromised endpoints.

name: Imperva Web Application Firewall – Cloud
description: Cloud WAF with positive security model, bot management, DDoS mitigation, and API security. Global PoP network ensures sub-2ms latency overhead for protected applications.

name: Akamai App & API Protector
description: Adaptive application and API security combining WAF, DDoS, bot management, and API discovery on Akamai's globally distributed intelligent edge platform.

name: Cloudflare DDoS Protection – Enterprise
description: Unmetered, unlimited DDoS mitigation across L3/4 and L7. 321 Tbps network capacity absorbs the largest attacks with automatic detection and mitigation in under 3 seconds.

name: Veeam Backup & Replication Enterprise Plus
description: Enterprise data protection with immutable backups, ransomware protection, and SureBackup automated recovery testing. Supports VMware, Hyper-V, cloud, and NAS.

name: Commvault Complete Data Protection
description: Enterprise data management platform covering backup, replication, archiving, and eDiscovery. Single policy framework for hybrid and multi-cloud environments.

name: Acronis Cyber Protect – Business
description: Integrated backup and cybersecurity platform combining anti-malware, URL filtering, and backup-level threat detection. Protects physical, virtual, and cloud workloads.

name: Druva inSync – Cloud Backup & Governance
description: SaaS data protection and governance for endpoints, Microsoft 365, and Google Workspace. Immutable cloud storage with air-gapped isolation and eDiscovery.

name: Red Hat Ansible Automation Platform – Enterprise
description: Enterprise IT automation with security hardening playbooks, compliance-as-code, and RBAC controls. Includes AAP Controller, EDA, and private automation hub.

name: HashiCorp Terraform Enterprise – IaC Platform
description: Enterprise infrastructure-as-code platform with policy-as-code via Sentinel, SSO, audit logging, and self-hosted deployment for air-gapped environments.

name: Datadog Cloud Security Management
description: Unified cloud security posture management and threat detection across cloud infrastructure. Correlates misconfigurations, vulnerabilities, and runtime signals in one view.

name: Palo Alto GlobalProtect VPN – 50-User License
description: Always-on IPsec/SSL VPN with HIP-based endpoint compliance checks and seamless integration with Palo Alto NGFW policy enforcement. Transparent to end users.
